payload.description: Station refresh program launched in July 2022, taking advantage of planned closures to do deep cleaning and tackle visible problems at stations
Pilot program launched in October 2022 with open stroller spaces on seven pilot bus routes across the boroughs
Pilot program with armed guards at MVMs at Myrtle-Wyckoff and unarmed guards at emergency exit gates in five stations
Deployment of two hydrogen fuel cell buses and installation of hydrogen fueling station at Gun Hill depot in the Bronx, funded by $8M NYSERDA grant
Bronx Local Bus Network Redesign continues to show positive trends after implementation
A draft Brooklyn Bus Network Redesign includes changes to local and express buses will be released later this year
Targeting to finalize Queens Bus Network Redesign next year

tool_args.label: Staten Island Express Bus Network Redesign

payload.project_name: Staten Island Express Bus Network Redesign
payload.description: Staten Island Express Bus Network Redesign continues to show positive trends after implementation
Expansion of Automated Bus Lane Enforcement cameras. 243 buses equipped on 11 routes across all five boroughs, aiming for 300 total buses
Effort launched to curb subway violence including surging officers, aiding mental health issues, and continuing camera rollout
Bus contra-flow lane on Pelham Bay where NYC DOT is painting the street red, to enable rerouting Bx12 SBS on a more direct route to Co-op City
Routes serving disadvantaged communities in northeast and central Bronx from Gun Hill depot

tool_args.label: Bus Customer Journey Time Performance October 2022
Weekend subway ridership as percent of pre-COVID
Weekend bus ridership as percent of pre-COVID

payload.raw_value_text: 243 buses equipped with ABLE cameras on 11 routes across all five boroughs

tool_args.label: NYC Transit & Bus Committee Meeting - November 2022

payload.description: November 2022 meeting of the New York City Transit & Bus Committee
TransitTalk event at 161 St-Yankee Stadium B/D/4 Station with Transit President Rich Davey and executive team
NYCT President Rich Davey celebrated 118th Anniversary of NYC subway visiting stations at 161 St-Yankee Stadium, Court Sq 7/G, and 72 St-2 Av Q
Station refresh program Station ReNEWvation began in July 2022
Open Stroller Pilot program launched with stroller spaces on seven pilot bus routes

tool_args.label: NYSERDA $8M grant award for hydrogen fuel cell buses

payload.description: MTA accepted $8 million award from NYSERDA as part of Electric Truck & Bus Challenge grants

tool_args.label: ABLE cameras activated on Bx12 and Bx41

payload.description: ABLE cameras activated on Bx12 and Bx41 bus routes in the Bronx
Bus contra-flow lane on Pelham Bay being painted red by NYC DOT, to enable rerouting Bx12 SBS to Co-op City
Tactile warning strips installed on more than 20 platform edges across a dozen stations, including Fordham Rd (B/D) and 170 St (B/D) stations in the Bronx

tool_args.label: North Star goal: increase customer satisfaction 10% by Spring 2024

payload.claim_text: The North Star goal is to increase customer satisfaction by at least 10 percent across the board by Spring 2024
payload.subject: New York City Transit

tool_args.label: Top five service attributes for customer experience

payload.claim_text: The top five service attributes that will improve the customer experience and encourage more frequent trips are: Faster, more frequent service; Cleaner stations and vehicles; Safer environment; Better weekend service; and Enhanced communications
payload.subject: NYCT customers

payload.claim_text: More than 5,000 seniors and people with disabilities have used our Digital Assistant to make the switch from MetroCard to OMNY
payload.subject: OMNY Reduced-Fare program

tool_args.label: Two-thirds of customers say too few police

payload.claim_text: Two-thirds of customers stated in the October Pulse survey that there were too few uniformed police officers in the system
payload.subject: Subway customers
